ops.title: cookiesync pin uses the module-path codesign identifier
ops.body: CallerCheck.pinnedIdentifiers pins com.github.yasyf.cookiesync (not bare 'cookiesync'): cookie-sync's goreleaser/quill pipeline stamps Go's default module-path identifier, verified against the shipped 0.16.0 cask binary's designated requirement (codesign -d -r-). Re-stamping the CLI to a bare name was rejected because it churns the binary's TCC/code identity. Release ordering: this authkit change must ship (cask upgrade) BEFORE the first cookiesync release that consumes authkit via the synckit bridge — otherwise every vault/cache call from migrated cookiesync exits 4 (caller-rejected). Decided 2026-07-18 during daemonkit-extraction Track A.
